title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AirAsia Cargo India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AirAsia Cargo India
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Fleet Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!
